mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_session (id, user_id, mode, subject_id, topic_id, scope_title, question_count, correct_count, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{mode}, #{subjectId}, #{topicId}, #{scopeTitle}, #{questionCount}, #{correctCount}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, mode, subject_id, topic_id, scope_title, question_count, correct_count, started_at, finished_at, create_time, update_time FROM practice_session WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
